content.en:
Cangyu Universe, Forbidden Area of the Sea of Blood.

This is a very famous forbidden area in the Cangyu universe, it is a real forbidden area, a non-god general-level powerhouse, once entered, he will definitely die, because the blood sea forbidden area has a blood sea enchantment, and the inside is full of blood qi that can make ordinary earth lords fall instantly.

Under normal circumstances, the gods would not be willing to enter the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone, because the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone only has blood qi and no other resources, so there is no benefit from entering.

But now, many gods will enter the forbidden area of the sea of blood.

Since the Earth Venerable couldn't enter, the specific situation was only circulated among the Divine Generals, so Ye Tian didn't know what was going on in the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone at the moment.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the entrance of the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone.

"It's such a big blood sea enchantment, it almost occupies the area of a star field, strange, the previous blood sea forbidden area is definitely not so big, the universe dimension and world are one, it has nothing to do with the forbidden area, why does the forbidden area become bigger?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Wow!

Ye Tian passed through the Blood Sea Enchantment and entered the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone.

As soon as he entered, a large amount of blood qi surged, filled with corrosive energy, but it was of little use to Ye Tian, it was equivalent to ordinary air, even if he inhaled blood qi, he could also use his powerful physical body to refine blood qi.

Rumble!!!

A blood-colored creature like a wolf rushed out of the sea of blood and killed Ye Tian.

Its strength is not weak, it is about the strength of an ordinary earth venerable, Ye Tianyi pointed out and killed the other party.

I saw the blood-colored creature explode, but it left behind a blood-colored crystal.

Ye Tianyi grabbed the blood-colored crystal, and instantly knew its usefulness.

"Blood crystals can enhance the blood qi of the human body, temper the blood qi and the physical body. Ye Tian said lightly.

He was a little strange, in the previous information, there were no living creatures in the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone, and naturally there was no such blood-colored creature, let's call it a blood beast.

But now, blood beasts were born here.

"Could it be that the rules of the universe have changed, so that blood beasts were born here. However, even a blood beast is not as good as a god-level fight, and there must be more precious treasures of chance!" Ye Tian guessed.

Along the way, some blood beasts attacked Ye Tian, and all of them were killed by Ye Tian, and the blood crystals were also collected by Ye Tian.

Blood crystal is also a precious energy resource, and it is very helpful for refining the body, Ye Tian consumes a lot of cultivation of the Xuan Xuan Technique, and the blood crystal is much better than other energy and resources, so he naturally has to collect more.

Moreover, the blood crystal can also help the human race earth lord refine the physical body and improve his strength, who doesn't want such a good thing?

Through the Life Heavenly Pupil, Ye Tian knew that those gods would be in the middle of the forbidden area of the Blood Sea, but he did not hurry over.

"100,000 blood crystals, almost, go to the center of the Blood Sea Forbidden Zone first, lest the real big opportunity fall into the hands of others!"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian quickly rushed over.

In the blink of an eye, he came to the center of the forbidden area of the Sea of Blood.

Here, the gods and generals are not lightly injured, and they are hostile to each other.

Ye Tian's arrival caused a big change in the expressions of all the god generals, and now Ye Tian's strength has also been exposed, and the other god generals know that it is already the strength of a three-star god general.

Three-star god general, what a terrible combat power this is.

And the strongest among them is only a two-star peak god general, and no one has yet hit a three-star god general.

All of a sudden, many gods and generals showed signs of uniting, and if Ye Tian dared to make a move against them, they would definitely all join forces to deal with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't care about these divine generals, and looked at the blood tree in the center of the forbidden area of the Blood Sea.

There are many fruits on this blood tree, but most of them are unripe.

"It's ...... True Blood Tree and True Blood Fruit !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He is not low in knowledge now, and he also knows the names of many treasures from some chaotic books, one of which is the True Blood Tree.

The True Blood Tree is undoubtedly one of the most treasures for god-level powerhouses, it is too great for the improvement of strength, and it can also consolidate the foundation of the physical body.

A ripe true blood fruit can temper the blood of the god general level many times, and if the blood is strong, the physical body will naturally become strong.

Ye Tian had cultivated the Xuanxuan Technique, and condensed the body of semi-chaotic life, the physical foundation was very strong, and his blood far surpassed that of other god generals, but his blood was still at the average level, and there was still a little gap between him and some True Spirit Realm genius descendants and Great Dao Realm genius descendants.

For example, some god generals who have completed the inheritance of their ancestors' bloodline even have a trace of true spiritual breath in their blood, and such blood can be called true blood.

In the universe, there are naturally no true blood descendants, after all, there are no powerful ancestors, unless they specialize in cultivating some terrible blood methods, they can make blood transform into true blood.

The Xuanxu Jue mentioned that if the Xuanxu Jue was cultivated to the sixth layer realm, he could completely convert his blood into true blood, which was even more pure and powerful than ordinary true blood descendants.

But how difficult it was to cultivate the Xuanxuan Jue to the sixth layer, Ye Tian was only at the fourth layer now.

If you convert a body of blood into true blood in advance, you can quickly improve the realm of Xuan Xuan Jue, which is blood replenishing the body.

For Ye Tian, this True Blood Fruit is a real treasure, and for other god generals, the True Blood Fruit must not make them crazy!

Because of this, they snatched the True Blood Fruit.

However, the True Blood Tree was rooted in the sea of blood, and if it was pulled out, it would not survive at all, so they did not dare to take the True Blood Tree, lest it destroy the True Blood Tree.

"These True Blood Fruits are not ripe yet, but a few are not far from ripe. It stands to reason that the True Blood Fruit is not ripe, and they will not fight, and it seems that there is more than one True Blood Fruit ripening here. At the beginning, the two-star god general was probably killed because of the True Blood Fruit, but now that the True Blood Tree is exposed, the god generals of the Tibetan God Organization can't block the news. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Guys, I wonder how many True Blood Fruits you've obtained?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hmph, the guys who got the True Blood Fruit have already fled!"

A god general said coldly.

Through conversation, Ye Tian knew that a total of three ripe true blood fruits were born here, which were taken away by three two-star god generals, and one of them was still a two-star peak god general.

After all, once you obtain the True Blood Fruit, you will inevitably become the target of others, and if you don't leave, you may be besieged and killed.

"A True Blood Fruit can make blood much stronger at most, but it is far from being able to convert all the blood into True Blood, I have to snatch more True Blood Fruits!" Ye Tian thought.

So, he sat cross-legged, also waiting for the true blood fruit to ripen.

Time passed slowly, and 5,000 years passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

An aroma emanated from one of the True Blood Fruits, which ripened.

Whew!!

A famous god will rush towards the true blood fruit with all his might, and some gods will even cast forbidden spells just to grab this true blood fruit.

"Get out!"

A cold snort came.

Then, the terrifying realm of coercion descended.

"Hunyuan Domain!"

In an instant, Ye Tian made a move, knocking all the many gods into the air with a devastating force, and he himself grabbed the True Blood Fruit and picked it off.

This true blood fruit belongs to Ye Tian!
